summary: Completed comprehensive testing of homepage pricing section implementation. All pricing features work correctly including 3-tier pricing cards, navigation links, Care Plan pricing, and restaurant demo page functionality.
passed_tests: Homepage loads with Pricing section visible between Demos and Audit sections
Pricing section displays 3 pricing cards with correct prices (Starter $1,297, Growth $1,897, Authority $2,897)
Growth card has 'Most Popular' badge and featured dark styling
Care Plan section shows correct $127/month pricing
Desktop navigation includes Pricing link that scrolls to #pricing section
Mobile navigation includes Pricing link accessible via hamburger menu
All 3 pricing CTAs correctly link to #audit section
Restaurant demo page works correctly at /demos/restaurant with full content
Pricing navigation link properly scrolls to pricing section with smooth scroll
